days.name: Thursday
days.session: FTP test 2.0 h (1+12 protocol). FTP confirmed at 321 W.
days.note: Why lower than a normal hard day: the 1+12 protocol has long warm-up + two short max efforts + rest blocks → ~250 kcal less than a typical hard ride this length. We pull that 250 from intake; protein floor and post-ride feeding stay intact.

fuel.title: Ride fuel (already done — for the record)

rows.label: Pre (3 h out)
rows.text: oats 120g + banana + honey + Greek yogurt 200g + coffee → ~160 g C, 25 g P.

rows.label: 30–60 min before warm-up
rows.text: 1 gel + 250 ml carb mix → +40 g C.

rows.label: On bike (~120–130 g)
rows.text: bottle at 80 g/L + 1 gel before each test effort. Sodium 800 mg/L.

rows.label: Post (within 30 min — non-negotiable)
rows.text: 500 ml chocolate milk + scoop whey + banana + dates → ~100 g C, 35 g P. FTP test empties glycogen — refill aggressively even though daily total is lower.

meals.label: Adjusted sample day · ~3,300 / 470 C / 160 P / 75 F
items: Lunch: rice 200g + chicken 180g + stir-fry veg + soy + 1 tsp sesame oil (~700 kcal).
Snack (light): skyr 200g + 1 fruit + drizzle of honey (~220 kcal).
Dinner (smaller): pasta 110g dry + lean beef 130g + tomato sauce + salad + 1 tsp olive oil (~580 kcal).

preload.label: Tomorrow preload · Fri = 3 h Long Z2
items: Dinner already lands carb-forward and lower-fat — that's the right shape. Don't add fat or fiber late.
If hungry before bed: extra honey on the skyr, banana, or a slice of toast. Carbs > protein at this point.
Hydrate to colourless urine before bed. Pinch of salt at dinner if sodium felt low.

rows.label: Pre (2–3 h out)
rows.text: oats 100g + banana + honey + Greek yogurt 200g + 2 eggs → ~145 g C, 30 g P.

rows.label: On bike (~195 g, 70–90 g/hr)
rows.text: 2 bottles mix at 60 g/L (= 120 g) + 2 gels (50 g) + 1 banana (25 g). Sodium 700 mg/L. Drink ~750 ml/hr. Start eating from min 30.

rows.label: Post (30–60 min)
rows.text: 500 ml chocolate milk + scoop whey + banana + dried fruit → ~100 g C, 30 g P.

meals.label: Sample day · ~4,600 / 770 C / 160 P / 90 F
items: Lunch: burrito bowl — rice 280g + chicken/beef 180g + black beans 100g + corn 50g + avocado 60g + salsa.
Snack: 2 rice cakes + 25g peanut butter + 1 fruit + 200g skyr + drizzle of honey.
Dinner: salmon 180g + sweet potato 320g + roasted broccoli + 1 tbsp olive oil.
Evening: Greek yogurt 200g + honey + granola 30g + banana.

preload.label: Tomorrow preload · Sat = 4 h Long Z2 (the big one)
items: Most important preload of the week. Snack and dinner above are already loaded — keep them that way. Don't substitute heavy fat (creamy pasta, fried food) or high fiber (lentil/bean bowl) for dinner.
If craving 2nd dinner / late snack: white rice + a little honey, or sourdough + jam, or banana + cereal. Aim for an extra 60–80 g carb if appetite allows.
Salt the dinner generously — Saturday is hot/long, want sodium status high before you start.
Lights out early. Set bottles + bars + breakfast prep before bed.

days.name: Saturday
days.session: Long Z2 4.0 h. Most important fueling day of the week.

rows.label: Pre (2–3 h out)
rows.text: oats 100g + 2 bananas + honey 30g + Greek yogurt 200g + 2 eggs → ~165 g C, 35 g P.

rows.label: 30 min before
rows.text: 1 gel + 250 ml carb mix → +40 g C.

rows.label: On bike (~340 g, 80–100 g/hr)
rows.text: 2 bottles mix at 80 g/L (= 160 g) + 4 jam-stuffed rice cakes (~100 g) + 2 gels (50 g) + 1 banana (25 g). Sodium 800 mg/L. Drink ≥750 ml/hr. Eat every 25–30 min — stay ahead.

rows.label: Post (within 30 min)
rows.text: 500 ml chocolate milk + scoop whey + banana + 50 g dried fruit → ~110 g C, 30 g P. Real meal within 90 min.

meals.label: Sample day · ~5,400 / 920 C / 165 P / 95 F
items: Lunch (real meal): pasta 220g dry + lean beef 180g + tomato sauce + parmesan 25g + salad.
Snack: 2 slices sourdough + honey + cottage cheese 150g + 1 fruit + 30g almonds.
Dinner: rice 280g + chicken thigh 180g + stir-fry veg + soy + 1 tsp sesame oil.
Evening: skyr 200g + honey + granola 40g + berries.

preload.label: Tomorrow preload · Sun = 3 h Long Z2
items: After 4-hour ride, glycogen will still be partly depleted into Sunday. Recovery shake + lunch + afternoon snack do the heavy lifting — don't skip even if appetite suppressed (very common after long rides).
If you can't face solid food right after: liquid first (chocolate milk, smoothie), real food in 90 min.
Dinner should still hit carbs — Sunday's ride pulls from today's stores.

days.name: Sunday
days.session: Long Z2 3.0 h. Legs heavy after Sat — expected.

rows.label: Pre
rows.text: same as Friday — oats + banana + honey + Greek yogurt + eggs → ~145 g C, 30 g P.

rows.label: On bike (~195 g, 70 g/hr)
rows.text: 2 bottles mix at 60 g/L + 2 gels + 1 banana. Sodium 700 mg/L.

rows.label: Post
rows.text: chocolate milk + scoop whey + banana + dates within 30–60 min.

meals.label: Sample day · same template as Friday
items: Swap rice for potatoes/quinoa if you're sick of it. Macros unchanged.
Sunday review: weigh-in fasted, post-bathroom. Note hunger, sleep, ride feel.

preload.label: Tomorrow preload · Mon = recovery / next block
items: After a 17.5-hour week, safe assumption is Monday is recovery or moderate. Eat normally to bedtime; let appetite drop on Monday if it wants to.
Sunday review (footer below) — log the week before going to sleep.

changelog: Today (FTP test): 4,200 → 3,300 kcal. Actual TP energy was 1,176 kcal (582 kcal/hr) — the 1+12 protocol has long warm-up + rest blocks, much lower than a standard hard ride.
Fri/Sat/Sun: 4,400 / 5,000 / 4,400 → 4,600 / 5,400 / 4,600. New FTP (321 W) means estimated Z2 avg power is ~231 W vs the implicit ~200 W in the old 706 kcal/hr blanket.
Added Tomorrow preload notes — what to do with today's last meals to set up tomorrow's session.
troubleshooting: Dragging by Friday → power estimates too conservative; add 200 kcal/day, mostly carb on ride days.
Weight stalls or trends up over 2 weeks → pull rest-day carbs by 50 g, hold ride days.
Tracking starts to weigh on mood → drop tracking; protein and ride fueling only.
Sick → pause the deficit, eat at maintenance, prioritize protein and fluids.

trainingPeaks.comment: Set enabled:true and fill in clientId + redirectUri once you have TP API credentials. See README for setup.
